3144140.name: Descending Darkness
3144140.description:
Descending Darkness is a multiplayer PvE shooter, your goal is to defend a mysterious bunker you wake up in. In order to accomplished that, you are given multiple ways of playing. Choose your style of playing to defend engines of the bunker and keep systems running!

Weapons:

Choose your weapon of favor, study new weaponary including turrets. Construct a defense with your friends thats unbreakable and never loose control over the bunker!

Enemies:

Get killed by dozen of different enemies and bosses. Survive waves with increasing difficulty and try take control by setting traps and blocking of paths.

Bunker:

Fight in a unique area constiting of narrow paths as well as open fields. Use map control as your adventage and keep track of hidden vents. Do not get charmed by the silence of the bunker!
3144140.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
